channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Delusional, desperate – and mostly called David, Brexiters gather to lament the Great Betratal | John Crace
item.description: Delusional, desperate – and mostly called David, Brexiters gather to lament the Great Betratal | John Crace

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Senior figures in Blue Labour turn on Burnham over Brexit
item.description: Senior figures in Blue Labour turn on Burnham over Brexit

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Starmer under pressure over Mandelson vetting files release after fresh delay
item.description: Politics latest: Starmer under pressure over Mandelson vetting files release after fresh delay

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live
item.description: Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: John Swinney wins vote to be re-appointed first minister
item.description: John Swinney wins vote to be re-appointed first minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Labour MPs ‘to urge ministers to scrap migration reforms’ as net migration set to drop to lowest level since Covid
item.description: Labour MPs ‘to urge ministers to scrap migration reforms’ as net migration set to drop to lowest level since Covid

item.title: FT UK Politics: Reform UK unveils candidate to challenge Andy Burnham in by-election

item.title: LabourList: Andy Burnham is now Labour’s Makerfield by-election candidate. What happens next?

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Senior minister defends decision to withhold some Mandelson files
item.description: Senior minister defends decision to withhold some Mandelson files
